title: FPBR
body:
# All textures from 25w31a(1.21.9) are supported！

you can feedback issues here
[【GitHub】](https://github.com/G2F1SH/FPBR-issues)

Join the discord group to give feedback on questions！
[Click me](https://discord.gg/b7rB6bY3RF)

Just so you know, this texture pack is currently under development，The latest official version has been stably supported！It's all free!

### Use verified shaders whenever possible!
1. Sundial Shader
2. Complementary Shaders
3. BSL Shader
4. Photon Shaders
5. Bliss Shaders
6. Nostalgia Shader

Other shaders that support PBR and parallax will certainly work as well！
